name: Gainful Employment Regulations
description: Requirements for career education programs leading to gainful employment
penalty_authority: Loss of Title IV eligibility for specific programs

requirements.title: Program Definition
requirements.description: GE programs must be educational programs leading to a credential other than a degree

requirements.title: Debt-to-Earnings Rates
requirements.description: Programs must meet debt-to-earnings thresholds comparing student debt to post-graduation earnings
requirements.penalty_range: Loss of Title IV eligibility after two consecutive failing years

requirements.title: Disclosure Requirements
requirements.description: Institution must disclose program-level costs, completion rates, and employment outcomes

requirements.title: Reporting Requirements
requirements.description: Institution must report student-level data for GE calculations

requirements.title: Earnings Premium
requirements.description: Program completers' median earnings must exceed high school graduate earnings in the state
